composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
MARKET BRIEF - 12 JUNE 2026

NO ACTION. BTC is in BEAR phase, 21% below its 200-day moving average with zero near-term entry signals. The z-score of +0.34 is well above crisis threshold (-3.0), and structural risk is now active: BTC sits 50.7% below its 1-year high, well past the 35% filter boundary. This combination blocks all buy signals regardless of phase. Without an extreme drawdown event, BEAR markets offer no reliable edge in the 7-120 day window. Expected return in this state: -6.2% at 120 days based on historical episodes.

Realized volatility at 33% has fallen below the 40% threshold, confirming structural weakness rather than panic selling. Shorts are paying lenders (-14% annualized funding), a sign of complacency, not capitulation. ETH and SOL show relative softness (z-scores -1.29 and -1.63 vs BTC), but alt weakness in a bear market is not actionable without a crisis trigger. Stand aside.
